name: The Cinder Throne
description: At the very bottom of the Reaches lies a perfect circle of scorched glass, black and mirror-smooth, ringed by standing shards of fused rock that lean inward like the teeth of a closing jaw. In the centre rises a throne that was never built, only scarred into being: a seat of blackened slag where the demonic residue of Pyraxis's death has pooled and cooled and slowly gathered itself a shape. The air over the glass shimmers with a heat that has no source, and the scorched circle drinks all light, so that whatever waits enthroned here is seen more as a wound in the dark than as a thing with edges.
ambient_messages: The heat above the scorched glass shudders and thickens, and for a heartbeat the whole circle glows a deep, arterial red.
A ring of the leaning shards hums with a low, grinding note, as though the jaw of the chamber is slowly tightening.
Something on the throne shifts its terrible weight, and a wave of scorched, sulphurous air rolls out across the black glass.
